email.description: Atlassian account email used as the Basic auth username.

api_token.description: Jira API token, sent as the Basic auth password. Never logged.

base_url.description: Jira Cloud site base URL, e.g. https://your-company.atlassian.net. Legacy derives this from a bare `domain` config value; this bundle requires the full base_url directly instead (no derived-default mechanism exists for a non-literal default — see docs.md Known limits).
